history.text: Federation of Malaya created or reshaped Malaysia's federal political structure.
North Borneo self-governance expanded local self-rule.
Proclamation of Malaysia formally announced a new political order.

worthSeeing.title: Borneo Rainforest:
worthSeeing.text: Ancient jungle home to orangutans, pygmy elephants, and clouded leopards.

worthSeeing.title: Petronas Towers:
worthSeeing.text: Twin towers that dominated the world's tallest building list for six years.

worthSeeing.title: Langkawi:
worthSeeing.text: Archipelago of 99 islands with white beaches, clear water, and duty-free shopping.
